flavorText: Ancients paladins serve life, light, and joy against encroaching darkness.

features.description: You uphold Kindle the Light, Shelter the Light, Preserve Your Own Light, and Be the Light.
Invoke spectral vines; a creature must make a Constitution save or be restrained.
As a sacred challenge, you gain advantage on attacks against a chosen foe for 1 minute.
You and allies within 10 feet gain resistance to damage from spells.
When reduced to 0 hit points, you can drop to 1 hit point instead (once per long rest).
You become an avatar of nature for 1 minute, regaining 10 hit points each turn, enhancing druidic casting, and imposing disadvantage on hostile saves within 10 feet.

ancients-tenets.summary: Your oath protects light, life, beauty, and hope against the forces that would smother them.
ancients-tenets.description: The Ancients oath frames the paladin less as a strict judge and more as a defender of living joy and sacred natural wonder.

ancients-natures-wrath.summary: Call on primal divine force to restrain a foe and stop the fight from unfolding on its terms.
ancients-natures-wrath.description: Nature's Wrath is a control-oriented Channel Divinity that gives the subclass real battlefield lockdown rather than pure damage.

ancients-vow-of-enmity.summary: Mark a single enemy for relentless pursuit so your pressure against that target becomes much more reliable.
ancients-vow-of-enmity.description: Vow of Enmity is the focused-duelist side of the subclass. It should feel like picking the creature that matters most and refusing to let it breathe.

ancients-aura-of-warding.summary: Your aura blunts hostile magic, making your group far harder to break with spells alone.
ancients-aura-of-warding.description: Aura of Warding is one of the subclass’s biggest team defenses. In spell-heavy fights it can reshape how much punishment the party can realistically absorb.

ancients-undying-sentinel.summary: When most champions would fall, your oath keeps you standing and difficult to kill cleanly.
ancients-undying-sentinel.description: Undying Sentinel adds late-game resilience and makes the subclass feel stubbornly luminous even under overwhelming pressure.

ancients-elder-champion.summary: Take on a mythic guardian state that turns your oath into a visible force of living power.
ancients-elder-champion.description: Elder Champion is the capstone expression of the subclass: radiant, durable, and suffused with ancient natural divinity.
